positive: Abstract geometric pattern design inspired by stained glass and Art Deco architecture. Focus on interlocking shapes, sharp angles, and a vibrant jewel-toned color scheme (sapphire blue, emerald green, gold). Symmetry, clean lines, tessellation pattern, highly decorative, flat vector illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, organic shapes, smoke, blur, gradient mess
